title: Phragmipedium warszewiczianum

The classification of Phragmipedium warszewiczianum is also sometimes referred to as a terrestrial or ground-dwelling orchid. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties.
